name: Lord Chompy Bits
title: Dreamlord

abilities.name: Demise (Uneasy)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, an enemy model within 1" gains a Fright token.

abilities.name: Monster Under the Bed
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may place into base contact with a friendly Under Your Bed marker.

abilities.name: U Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

triggers.name: Fueled By Fear
triggers.text: Once per turn. Draw two cards and then discard one card.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Twist Reality
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model chooses whether this action is resisted by Df or Wp. For each raise this action receives, summon one Daydream in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Dream Chaser
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Place this model in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: The icon before 'Fueled By Fear' trigger appears to be a fortitude icon rather than a standard suit.
The icon before 'Execute' trigger appears to reference fortitude in the trigger text as well.
